creator: sasamotikomi@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Mathieu Arnold from comment #1)
Quarterly branch contains unstable ports included software who have problem with build(flags/depends/linking etc.) or even segfault from start or just often renamed, I talk about branch with tested port who actually work, not "give pain" after update and more friendly for end user.
I think before do it we must standardized many ordinary procedures in ports.
